body.title: memory provenance and validation status
body.result: validate_memory/reject_memory/list_unvalidated_memories tools. NE promotion stores tagged provenance_source=ne_synthesis, validation_status=unvalidated.
body.description: Memories created by inference (NE synthesis, tool output, upstream injection, LLM deposits) should carry: (1) provenance_source = what system generated this, (2) reasoning_ref = turn trace ID that produced it (already logged), (3) validation_status = unvalidated|validated|rejected. Before relying on a memory in reasoning, check validation_status. Unvalidated memories are usable but should not be treated as ground truth. Validated = Akien confirmed or directly observed. Key: not about rejecting injected memories, about knowing their epistemic status. Connects to T-urgency-provenance — same question applies: where did this come from and can we trace it?
